items.title: Report: New Zelda Ocarina of Time remake set for release on Switch 2 this year, new Star Fox game, more
items.summary:
There have been some notable releases for Switch 2 thus far, but nothing overly remarkable at this point. We have had some notable first-party releases with the new Mario Tennis game and the Super Mario Bros. Wonder expansion, not to mention the surprisingly well-received Pokémon Pokopia. But Nintendo is going to need some heavy hitters to keep the hype rolling this year – will we finally get a new 3D Mario experience? Doesn’t sound like it at this point, but rumor has it a massive Zelda remake is inbound alongside a new Star Fox game and much sooner than later at that.

The Apple Watch deals are flying in Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, but one offer that really deserves some more love are the clearance deals on the Titanium Series 10 models. These clearance offers that hit on the previous year’s models are easily the best chances to score the premium models at a giant discount and the Series 10 is still a perfectly capable option. Various GPS + Cell with the sweet Titanium case are still in stock at $300 off the list price, including both 42mm and 46mm models.

items.title: Sonos Big Spring Sale deals live at up to $130 off: Mini sub, portable speakers, more
items.summary:
We spotted some early Sonos spring sale deals over at Amazon a couple weeks ago, but many of them are carrying over into the official Big Spring event. The brand hit us with a number of official price hikes at the end of 2025, just before launching the all-new Sonos Play at $299 and the Sonos Era 100 SL speaker at $189, but we are seeing some price drops on both its portable speakers and soundbars as well as the mini wireless subwoofer for those looking to either expand an existing setup or jump in for the first time this spring. 

more…

items.title: Affordably bring home a 32-inch to 75-inch Roku smart TV with up to 25% spring savings starting from $99
items.summary:
During the remaining days of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, you can affordably bring home a Roku smart TV with up to 25% discounts starting from $99. While things start lowest with the 720p 32-inch Select Series HD Smart TV at $99 shipped, I personally would spend the minuscule extra amount to instead go with the 32-inch Select Series 1080p Full HD Smart TV at $109.99 shipped that has fallen from $130 here, unless you’d prefer a much more advanced and larger model, like the 72-inch Plus Series 4K QLED Smart TV or any of the models in-between them. Not only is the 1080p 32-inch model starting with an already budget-friendly full price, but the $20 cut from the tag puts it back at its all-time low. Be sure to head below and browse the full lineup of deals while they last, which make excellent opportunities to upgrade your media rooms, kids’ rooms, or elsewhere in your home and beyond.

more…

items.title: Might as well save while you can – BAMBOO COOL underwear multipacks fall as low as $20 (Up to 33% off)
items.summary:
As a part of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale you can currently find BAMBOO COOL underwear, pajamas, and socks priced from $20. Our top pick is this 7-pack of Ultra Breathable Boxer Briefs for $47.74 shipped. These generally fetch $60 or nearly $9 each, but today’s offer drops that down to under $7 per pair. This is one of those purchases that few look forward to shelling out for, but you might as well spend less while you can. To each their own, but I prefer styles that aren’t flashy and priorize comfort. This set is comprised of 47% viscose, which helps keep you cooler than cotton. Head below to find many more options to pick from with pricing that’s up to 33% off.

more…

items.title: Save up to 53% on Hiboy e-bikes, e-scooters, and accessories during both Amazon + direct Spring Sales starting from $40
items.summary:
During Amazon’s ongoing Big Spring Sale event, you can find a selection of Hiboy EVs getting up to 26% discounts, which runs parallel to the brand’s direct Spring Sale event that has a much larger lineup of offers at up to 53% off. One offer that you can find within both sales is the Hiboy EX6 e-bike down at $899.99 shipped. It may carry a $1,580 MSRP direct from the brand, but recently hasn’t been seen climbing above $1,100. While we have seen it go a bit lower in 2025, you’re looking at a $200 markdown off the going rate here that gives you the best price we have tracked in 2026. You can find all the Amazon-specific deals rounded up below, as well as the direct Spring Sale offers on the main landing page here.

more…

items.title: tomtoc backpacks, slings, more fall as low as $20 for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (Up to 40% off)
items.summary:
We’re in day 3 of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale and it’s time to shine a spotlight on tomtoc’s markdowns at up to 40% off. One of my favorites is the tomtoc 10L EDC Sling Bag at $56.79 shipped. These days it spends most of its time up at $71, but when it drops, it tends to drop this low. It has fallen as low as $52 in the past, but we’re talking $5 for a price difference we haven’t spotted since late 2023. This sleek and spacious offering boasts enough room for a 14-inch MacBook Pro plus a bunch of other gear. If you have a different style in mind, browse the list down below to see all of your options starting from $20.

items.title: No outlet, no problem – WYZE Bulb Cam can help at $40, more security gear from $30 (Up to 36% off)
items.summary:
Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is kicking right now and WYZE is offering up to 36% off it’s already-affordable home security lineup. My top pick is the standout WYZE Bulb Security Camera down at $39.98 shipped. This unit tends to sell for $50, but right now you can cash in for $10 less. Not much needs to be said here about what makes this security camera different. Instead of a wall outlet, it can derive it’s power from a light fixture. This paves the way for hassle-free installation and best of all, it still has a built-in light too. You can find a lot of other WYZE discounts down below that are priced from $30.
